trans-unit.source: Not assigned to any crafting station.

trans-unit.id: Static value - not affected by modifiers
trans-unit.source: Static value - not affected by modifiers

trans-unit.id: DepositTerrainModule ({0}) spawn rate ({1:E2}) is too high! It will create new deposit every {2} blocks with max deposit size {3}! It may create lot of extra blocks and significantly slow down generation. To fix this decrease spawn rate at least to {4:E2} (for 20% space between deposits).
trans-unit.source: DepositTerrainModule ({0}) spawn rate ({1:E2}) is too high! It will create new deposit every {2} blocks with max deposit size {3}! It may create lot of extra blocks and significantly slow down generation. To fix this decrease spawn rate at least to {4:E2} (for 20% space between deposits).
trans-unit.target: DepositTerrainModule ({0}) ortaya çıkma oranı ({1:E2}) çok yüksek! Maksimum kaplama boyutu {3} olan her {2} blokta yeni kaplama oluşturulacaktır! Bu çok fazla blok ortaya çıkarabilir ve üretimi gözle görülür derecede yavaşlatabilir. Bu ortaya çıkma oranını en az {4:E2} oranında düşürerek düzeltmek için (kaplamalar arasındaki 20% boşluk için).

trans-unit.id: DepositTerrainModule ({0}) spawn rate ({1:E2}) is high! It will create new deposit every {2} blocks with max deposit size {3}! It may create too tight deposits. To fix this decrease spawn rate at least to {4:E2} (for 20% space between deposits).
trans-unit.source: DepositTerrainModule ({0}) spawn rate ({1:E2}) is high! It will create new deposit every {2} blocks with max deposit size {3}! It may create too tight deposits. To fix this decrease spawn rate at least to {4:E2} (for 20% space between deposits).
trans-unit.target: DepositTerrainModule ({0}) ortaya çıkma oranı ({1:E2}) yüksek! Maksimum kaplama boyutu {3} olan her {2} blokta yeni kaplama oluşturulacaktır! Bu çok fazla sıkıştırılmış kaplamalar ortaya çıkarabilir. Bu ortaya çıkma oranını en az {4:E2} oranında düşürerek düzeltmek için (kaplamalar arasındaki 20% boşluk için).

trans-unit.id: Defines depth range to start spawn in. It may go out of depth range while growing deposit though. You can use DepositDepthRange to control deposit bounds.
trans-unit.source: Defines depth range to start spawn in. It may go out of depth range while growing deposit though. You can use DepositDepthRange to control deposit bounds.
trans-unit.target: Başlamak için derinlik aralığını tanımlar. Ancak depozito büyürken derinlik aralığının dışına çıkabilir. Para yatırma sınırlarını kontrol etmek için DepositDepthRange'i kullanabilirsiniz.\nİçerik Talep.

trans-unit.id: Defines depth range to keep deposit within. It is still possible to go out of deposit depth range bounds, but it will have big penalty.
trans-unit.source: Defines depth range to keep deposit within. It is still possible to go out of deposit depth range bounds, but it will have big penalty.
trans-unit.target: Depozitoyu içinde tutmak için Derinlik aralığını tanımlayın. Mevduat derinliği menzil sınırlarının dışına çıkmak hala mümkündür, ancak bunun büyük bir cezası olacaktır.

trans-unit.id: A rotary kiln that produces cement and concrete products.
trans-unit.source: A rotary kiln that produces cement and concrete products.
trans-unit.target: Çimentodan ve betondan mamulleri üretmek için bir fırın.

trans-unit.source: There are no available projects that require {0}

trans-unit.source: {0} is not active and can't be cancelled.

trans-unit.source: Can't take the role while {0} is on an unplaced board.

trans-unit.source: Is on an unplaced contract board.

trans-unit.source: Can holders of this position set the global objective in the objective window?
trans-unit.target: Bu pozisyonun sahibi hedef sekmesinde küresel hedef belirleyebilir mi?

trans-unit.id: When you gotta go, you gotta go.
trans-unit.source: When you gotta go, you gotta go.

trans-unit.id: A crushing machine that uses iron stamps to pound rocks into small pieces.
trans-unit.source: A crushing machine that uses iron stamps to pound rocks into small pieces.
trans-unit.target: Kayaları küçük parçalara ayırmak için demir damgalar kullanan bir kırma makinesi.

trans-unit.id: A heavy duty machine that uses compressive force to crush rocks into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: A heavy duty machine that uses compressive force to crush rocks into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: Kayaları ince çakıl haline getirmek için sıkıştırma kuvveti kullanan ağır hizmet tipi bir makine.

trans-unit.id: Elected officials can perform one-time executive actions here.
trans-unit.source: Elected officials can perform one-time executive actions here.
trans-unit.target: Seçilmiş yetkililer burada bir seferlik yönetici eylemi yapabilir.

trans-unit.id: A tamper proof box where votes are cast. Citizens can run for elected office here.
trans-unit.source: A tamper proof box where votes are cast. Citizens can run for elected office here.
trans-unit.target: Oyların kullanıldığı kurcalamaya dayalı bir kanıt kutusu. Vatandaşlar seçilmiş ofislere adaylığını koyabilir.

trans-unit.id: Tailorings work with cloth to make high-end furniture.and clothing that provides special bonuses when worn.
trans-unit.source: Tailorings work with cloth to make high-end furniture.and clothing that provides special bonuses when worn.
trans-unit.target: Terziler, üst düzey mobilyalar ve giydiğinde ekstra özellikler verecek olan kıyafetler üretmek için kumaş kullanarak çalışırlar.

trans-unit.id: Smiths smelt concentrate ore into metal bars and craft superior tools that helps citizens work more productively.
trans-unit.source: Smiths smelt concentrate ore into metal bars and craft superior tools that helps citizens work more productively.
trans-unit.target: Demirciler, yoğunlaşmış cevheri demir barlar ile birleştirerek vatandaşların daha verimli çalışmasına yardımcı olan üst düzey araçlar ortaya çıkarırlar.

trans-unit.id: Hunting animals provides a great source of nutritious food and their skins can be used in a variety of crafting projects.
trans-unit.source: Hunting animals provides a great source of nutritious food and their skins can be used in a variety of crafting projects.
trans-unit.target: Av hayvanları, besin değeri yüksek gıdalar elde etmek için büyük bir kaynaktır. Ayrıca derileri de çeşitli zanaat projelerinde kullanılabilir.

trans-unit.id: Farmers specialize in all aspects of agriculture. The crops they produce are a primary source of the calories needed to perform work.
trans-unit.source: Farmers specialize in all aspects of agriculture. The crops they produce are a primary source of the calories needed to perform work.
trans-unit.target: Çiftçiler tarımın her alanında uzmanlaşmış kişilerdir. Çiftçiler tarafından meydana getirilen mahsuller çalışman için gereken ana kalori kaynağını oluşturmaktadır.

trans-unit.id: Engineers use the materials created by other professions to create cutting edge technology that paves the way for technological advancement.
trans-unit.source: Engineers use the materials created by other professions to create cutting edge technology that paves the way for technological advancement.
trans-unit.target: Mühendisler, diğer meslekler tarafından ortaya çıkarılan ürünleri, gelişimin önünü açacak olan çağdaş teknolojiyi yaratmak için kullanır.

trans-unit.id: Cannot post a contract on an unplaced board.
trans-unit.source: Cannot post a contract on an unplaced board.

trans-unit.id: Do you wish to clear all data saved in this object?
trans-unit.source: Do you wish to clear all data saved in this object?
trans-unit.target: Bu nesnedeki kaydedilmiş tüm verileri temizlemek istiyor musun?

trans-unit.id: This object has been used previously and contains saved data.
trans-unit.source: This object has been used previously and contains saved data.
trans-unit.target: Bu nesne daha önce kullanılmış, içerisinde kayıtlı veriler bulunuyor.

trans-unit.id: Carpenters use harvested logs to craft a variety of useful products. Wood is an excellent source of building materials and furniture for homes.
trans-unit.source: Carpenters use harvested logs to craft a variety of useful products. Wood is an excellent source of building materials and furniture for homes.
trans-unit.target: Marangozlar keresteleri kullanarak birçok kullanışlı materyal üretebilir. Odun, ev eşyası ve çeşitli malzemeler için vazgeçilmez bir kaynaktır.

trans-unit.id: Teleports player A to player B
trans-unit.source: Teleports player A to player B

trans-unit.source: Add an object of the give type.

trans-unit.id: A large table for placing things on.
trans-unit.source: A large table for placing things on.
trans-unit.target: Üzerine eşyaları koymak için geniş bir masa.

trans-unit.id: A metal sign that is especially useful when placed alongside a road to provide information or give instructions to road users.
trans-unit.source: A metal sign that is especially useful when placed alongside a road to provide information or give instructions to road users.
trans-unit.target: Metal bir tabela, yol üstüne konduğunda bilgi vermek için ve ya yol göstermek için aşırı yararlı.

trans-unit.id: A traffic sign used to notify drivers to come to a complete stop and make sure the interesection is clear before proceeding.
trans-unit.source: A traffic sign used to notify drivers to come to a complete stop and make sure the interesection is clear before proceeding.
trans-unit.target: Bir trafik levhası, sürücüleri durdurmak ve devam etmeden önce yolun boş olduğundan emin olmalarını sağlar.

trans-unit.id: An early stone table. Not much to look at but it does the job.
trans-unit.source: An early stone table. Not much to look at but it does the job.
trans-unit.target: Eski bir taş masa. Pek iyi gözükmüyor ama işini yapıyor.

trans-unit.id: A basic stone fireplace. Not much to look at it but a great source of heat.
trans-unit.source: A basic stone fireplace. Not much to look at it but a great source of heat.
trans-unit.target: Basit bir taş şömine. Pek iyi gözükmüyor ama harika bir ısınma kaynağı.

trans-unit.id: An early stone chair. Not too comfy but it does the job.
trans-unit.source: An early stone chair. Not too comfy but it does the job.
trans-unit.target: Eski bir taş sandalye. Pek konforlu gözükmüyor ama işini yapıyor.

trans-unit.id: A basic stone bench for sitting.
trans-unit.source: A basic stone bench for sitting.

trans-unit.source: A trap to catch river fish as they swim. It can only be used in fresh water as it's too small to catch the larger ocean fish.

trans-unit.id: A basic wheel for use in early wooden vehicles.
trans-unit.source: A basic wheel for use in early wooden vehicles.
trans-unit.target: Basit bir tekerlek, eski tahta araçlar için.

trans-unit.id: A disc shaped steel saw that can be attached to rotary machines to shape wood and masonry products.
trans-unit.source: A disc shaped steel saw that can be attached to rotary machines to shape wood and masonry products.
trans-unit.target: Bir disk şeklinde Çelik Testere, Odunu Şekillendirmek ve Duvarcılık üretimi için dönen makinelere eklenebilir.

trans-unit.id: A sturdy steel plate for use in various crafting recipes.
trans-unit.source: A sturdy steel plate for use in various crafting recipes.
trans-unit.target: Sağlam bir çelik plaka, çeşitli üretim tarifleri için.

trans-unit.id: A rotating steel rod that can be fixed to wheels for use in vehicles.
trans-unit.source: A rotating steel rod that can be fixed to wheels for use in vehicles.
trans-unit.target: Dönen bir çelik çubuk, arabalar için tekerleklere eklenebilir.

trans-unit.id: Rubber wheels provide much better traction and allow the construction of more modern vehicles.
trans-unit.source: Rubber wheels provide much better traction and allow the construction of more modern vehicles.
trans-unit.target: Lastik tekerlekler çok daha iyi çekiş sağlar ve daha Modern Araçların yapımına olanak tanır.

trans-unit.id: A sturdy iron wheel that can support heavier vehicles than early wooden wheels.
trans-unit.source: A sturdy iron wheel that can support heavier vehicles than early wooden wheels.
trans-unit.target: Sağlam bir demir tekerlek, eski ahşap tekerleklerden daha ağır araçları taşıyabilir.

trans-unit.id: A disc shaped iron saw that can be attached to rotary machines to shape wood products.
trans-unit.source: A disc shaped iron saw that can be attached to rotary machines to shape wood products.
trans-unit.target: Bir disk şeklinde Çelik Testere, Odunu Şekillendirmek için döner makinelere eklenebilir.

trans-unit.id: A solid iron plate for use in various crafting recipes.
trans-unit.source: A solid iron plate for use in various crafting recipes.
trans-unit.target: Çeşitli işçilik tariflerinde kullanım için sağlam bir Demir Plaka.

trans-unit.id: A rotating iron rod that can be fixed to wheels for use in vehicles.
trans-unit.source: A rotating iron rod that can be fixed to wheels for use in vehicles.
trans-unit.target: Dönen bir çelik çubuk, arabalar için tekerleklere eklenebilir.

trans-unit.id: In order to be usable it needs to be reinforced.
trans-unit.source: In order to be usable it needs to be reinforced.

trans-unit.id: A vessel used for heating fluids.
trans-unit.source: A vessel used for heating fluids.

trans-unit.id: A baked bun filled with tasty meat and mushrooms.
trans-unit.source: A baked bun filled with tasty meat and mushrooms.
trans-unit.target: Lezzetli et ve mantarlarla doldurulmuş bir çörek.

trans-unit.id: An extra fatty leavened dough for making yummy pastries.
trans-unit.source: An extra fatty leavened dough for making yummy pastries.
trans-unit.target: Lezzetli hamur işleri yapmak için fazla yağlı mayalanmış bir hamur.

trans-unit.id: Leavened dough with added yeast that rises when baked.
trans-unit.source: Leavened dough with added yeast that rises when baked.

trans-unit.id: Blackened taro root. Not the tastiest meal, but a great source of energy for early rainforest settlers.
trans-unit.source: Blackened taro root. Not the tastiest meal, but a great source of energy for early rainforest settlers.
trans-unit.target: Kararmış gölevez kökü. Lezzetli bir öğün denilemez, ama erken yağmur ormanı yerleşimcileri için iyi bir enerji kaynağı.

trans-unit.id: Pineapple that has been charred over a basic campfire.
trans-unit.source: Pineapple that has been charred over a basic campfire.
trans-unit.target: Tipik bir kamp ateşinde yakılmış ananas.

trans-unit.id: Papaya fruit that has been charred over a basic campfire.
trans-unit.source: Papaya fruit that has been charred over a basic campfire.
trans-unit.target: Tipik bir kamp ateşinde yakılmış papaya meyvesi.

trans-unit.id: A collection of charred mushrooms. Cooking mushrooms properly can remove some of the toxins.
trans-unit.source: A collection of charred mushrooms. Cooking mushrooms properly can remove some of the toxins.
trans-unit.target: Bir yakılmış mantar yığını. Mantarları doğru pişirmek bazı toksinleri kaldırabilir.

trans-unit.id: Heart of palm collected fom fallen pineapple trees that have been charred over a campfire.
trans-unit.source: Heart of palm collected fom fallen pineapple trees that have been charred over a campfire.
trans-unit.target: Kamp ateşinde yakılmış, düşen ananas ağaçlarından toplanmış hurmanın kalbi.

trans-unit.id: Blackened cactus fruit. A favorite of early desert settlers.
trans-unit.source: Blackened cactus fruit. A favorite of early desert settlers.
trans-unit.target: Kararmış kaktüs meyvesi. Erken çöl yerleşimcilerinin favorilerinden.

trans-unit.id: A mushy mixture that can serve somewhat as a replacement protein in a meatless diet.
trans-unit.source: A mushy mixture that can serve somewhat as a replacement protein in a meatless diet.
trans-unit.target: Etsiz bir diyette protein ihtiyacını karşılasın diye tüketilen lapa gibi bir karışım.

trans-unit.id: Agave leaves that have been charred over a campfire
trans-unit.source: Agave leaves that have been charred over a campfire

trans-unit.id: Baked tomatoes might not look as red or plump as the raw variety, but they are nice and tasty.
trans-unit.source: Baked tomatoes might not look as red or plump as the raw variety, but they are nice and tasty.
trans-unit.target: Pişmiş domatesler çiğ hâli kadar kırmızı veya dolgun gözükmeyebilir, ama güzel ve lezzetlilerdir.

trans-unit.id: Baked meat is less fatty than other methods of cooking.
trans-unit.source: Baked meat is less fatty than other methods of cooking.
trans-unit.target: Fırında pişmiş et diğer pişirme yöntemlerine göre daha az yağlıdır.

trans-unit.id: Baked heart of palm that retains more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.source: Baked heart of palm that retains more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.target: Diğer pişirme yöntemlerine göre daha fazla besin kaybetmeyen fırında pişmiş hurmanın kalbi.

trans-unit.id: Baked corn that retains more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.source: Baked corn that retains more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.target: Diğer pişirme yöntemlerine göre daha fazla besin kaybetmeyen fırında pişmiş mısır.

trans-unit.id: Baked beets that retain more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.source: Baked beets that retain more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.target: Diğer pişirme yöntemlerine göre daha fazla besin kaybetmeyen fırında pişmiş pancar.

trans-unit.id: The succulent leaves of the agave plant can be cooked to make a nice meal.
trans-unit.source: The succulent leaves of the agave plant can be cooked to make a nice meal.
trans-unit.target: Agave bitkisinin dolgun yaprakları güzel bir öğün için pişirilebilir.

trans-unit.id: Wood pulp and dirt make a great filler for other fertilizers.
trans-unit.source: Wood pulp and dirt make a great filler for other fertilizers.
trans-unit.target: Odun hamuru ve toprak diğer gübreler için iyi dolgu malzemesidir.

trans-unit.id: Phosphate fertilizer is a great source of Phosphorus.
trans-unit.source: Phosphate fertilizer is a great source of Phosphorus.
trans-unit.target: Fosfat gübresi Fosfor için iyi bir kaynaktır.

trans-unit.id: A fertilize made from fur pelts and filler.
trans-unit.source: A fertilize made from fur pelts and filler.
trans-unit.target: Kürk postları ve dolgudan yapılmış bir gübre.

trans-unit.id: A fertilizer made from hide ash and fillers.
trans-unit.source: A fertilizer made from hide ash and fillers.
trans-unit.target: Deri külü ve dolgulardan yapılmış bir gübre.

trans-unit.id: A filler ingredient used in a variety of fertilizers.
trans-unit.source: A filler ingredient used in a variety of fertilizers.

trans-unit.id: Compost fertilizer is a classic, low effort fertilizer.
trans-unit.source: Compost fertilizer is a classic, low effort fertilizer.
trans-unit.target: Organik gübre klasik, düşük çaba gerektiren bir gübredir.

trans-unit.id: Camas ash fertilizer, though not very potent, is a great source of potassium.
trans-unit.source: Camas ash fertilizer, though not very potent, is a great source of potassium.
trans-unit.target: Camas külü gübresi, çok güçlü olmasa da iyi bir potasyum kaynağı.

trans-unit.id: Blood meal is a great source of nitrogen.
trans-unit.source: Blood meal is a great source of nitrogen.
trans-unit.target: Kan unu iyi bir nitrojen kaynağıdır.

trans-unit.id: Spruce log is a type of softwood, sometimes referred to as whitewood.
trans-unit.source: Spruce log is a type of softwood, sometimes referred to as whitewood.
trans-unit.target: Ladin Kütüğü bir tip Yumuşak Odundur, bazen Beyaz Odun olarak adlandırılır.

trans-unit.id: Saguaro rib is a basic, lightweight wood harvested from the saguaro cactus.
trans-unit.source: Saguaro rib is a basic, lightweight wood harvested from the saguaro cactus.
trans-unit.target: Saguaro çubuğu basit bir saguaro kaktüsünden hasat edilen hafif ahşaptır.

trans-unit.id: Redwood log is a type of softwood that can be easily identified by its distinct red bark.
trans-unit.source: Redwood log is a type of softwood that can be easily identified by its distinct red bark.
trans-unit.target: Sekoya Kütüğü bir tip yumuşak odundur, belirgin kırmızı kabuğu ile kolayca tanınabilir.

trans-unit.id: Oak log is a type of hardwood. With its great strength and hardness, oak is commonly used for furniture and building materials.
trans-unit.source: Oak log is a type of hardwood. With its great strength and hardness, oak is commonly used for furniture and building materials.
trans-unit.target: Meşe Kütüğü bir tip Sert Odundur. Gücü ve sertliği ile Meşe genelde ev materyalleri ve ev eşyaları için kullanılır.

trans-unit.id: Iron ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.source: Iron ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.target: Safsızlıkları gidermek için konsantre edilmiş demir cevheri. Cevher konsantresi, demirciler tarafından metal çubukları eritmek için kullanılır.

trans-unit.id: Gold ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.source: Gold ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.target: Safsızlıkları gidermek için konsantre edilmiş Altın cevheri. Cevher konsantresi, demirciler tarafından metal çubukları eritmek için kullanılır.

trans-unit.id: Fir log is a type of softwood with a nice piney smell.
trans-unit.source: Fir log is a type of softwood with a nice piney smell.
trans-unit.target: Köknar kütüğü, hoş bir çam kokusu olan bir tür yumuşak ağaçtır.

trans-unit.source: Slag that has been crushed into a fine gravel.

trans-unit.source: Crushed iron ore that is ready to be concentrated.

trans-unit.id: Granite rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: Granite rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.

trans-unit.id: Crushed gold ore that is ready to be concentrated.

trans-unit.target: Konsantre edilmeye hazır parçalanmış altın cevheri.

trans-unit.id: Gneiss rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: Gneiss rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: İnce bir çakıl haline getirilmiş gyans kayaları.

trans-unit.id: Crushed copper ore that is ready to be concentrated.
trans-unit.source: Crushed copper ore that is ready to be concentrated.
trans-unit.target: Konsantre edilmeye hazır parçalanmış bakır cevheri.

trans-unit.id: Basalt rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: Basalt rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: İnce bir çakıl haline getirilmiş bazalt kayaları.

trans-unit.id: Copper ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.source: Copper ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.target: Katışıklığı gidermek için konsantre edilmiş bakır cevheri. Cehver konsantresi, demir ustaları tarafından milleri eritmek için kullanılır.

trans-unit.id: Ceiba log is a type of hardwood. The Ceiba tree, with its giant trunk, is often sought after by loggers for the large volume of logs it produces.
trans-unit.source: Ceiba log is a type of hardwood. The Ceiba tree, with its giant trunk, is often sought after by loggers for the large volume of logs it produces.
trans-unit.target: Floş kütüğü bir tür sert ağaç kütüğüdür. Dev gövdesi ile birlikte bu ağaç, gövdesinden elde edilen yüksek miktardaki kütükler sebebiyle oduncular tarafından çok fazla rağbet görmekte olan bir ağaçtır.

trans-unit.id: Cedar log is a type of softwood. Cedar wood is a natural repellent to moths.
trans-unit.source: Cedar log is a type of softwood. Cedar wood is a natural repellent to moths.
trans-unit.target: Sedir kütüğü bir yumuşak ağaç türüdür. Sedir tahtası doğal bir güve savardır.

trans-unit.id: Birch log is a type of hardwood, notable for its white and papery bark.
trans-unit.source: Birch log is a type of hardwood, notable for its white and papery bark.
trans-unit.target: Huş kütüğü sert bir ağaç türüdür, beyaz ve ince kabuğundan tanınır.

trans-unit.id: Ashlar is finely cut stone made by an expert mason. Ashlar stone is an especially decorative building material that comes in a variety of styles based on the type of rock used.
trans-unit.source: Ashlar is finely cut stone made by an expert mason. Ashlar stone is an especially decorative building material that comes in a variety of styles based on the type of rock used.
trans-unit.target: Karo taşı, usta bir duvarcı tarafından ince ince kesilmiş taştır. Karo taşı duvarı, kullanılan taşa bağlı olarak çeşitli biçimleri olan oldukça dekoratif bir yapı malzemesidir.

trans-unit.id: Used to construct buildings and pickup manmade objects.
trans-unit.source: Used to construct buildings and pickup manmade objects.
trans-unit.target: Yapay objeleri tutmak ve yapıları inşa etmekte kullanılır.

trans-unit.id: A wooden pole attached to a line and hook. Used to catch fish from rivers and the ocean.
trans-unit.source: A wooden pole attached to a line and hook. Used to catch fish from rivers and the ocean.
trans-unit.target: Misina ve kanca tahta bir çubuğa bağlanır. Nehirler ve okyanustan balık tutmak için kullanılır.

trans-unit.id: This log cannot be sliced any smaller
trans-unit.source: This log cannot be sliced any smaller
trans-unit.target: Bu kütük daha küçük şekilde kesilemez

trans-unit.id: Dev object for testing air pollution.
trans-unit.source: Dev object for testing air pollution.

trans-unit.id: Water is an abundant resource. Fresh water can be found in rivers and lakes while salt water is found in the ocean. In addition to being a home to fish, water is needed for a variety of objects to function.
trans-unit.source: Water is an abundant resource. Fresh water can be found in rivers and lakes while salt water is found in the ocean. In addition to being a home to fish, water is needed for a variety of objects to function.
trans-unit.target: Su bol bulunan bir kaynaktır. Taze su nehirlerde ve göllerde bulunabilirken, tuzlu su okyanuslarda bulunur. Balıkların yaşam alanı olmasının yanında, çeşitli nesnelerin çalışması için de suya ihtiyaç vardır.

trans-unit.id: Increases/decreases CO2 by this value per day.

Etrafta '{0}' adında hayvan türü mevcut değil.

trans-unit.id: You have been given {0} specialty points by {1}.
trans-unit.source: You have been given {0} specialty points by {1}.

trans-unit.id:
This clause allows you to restrict the acceptance of a contract to only those that have a reputation equal to or greater than the defined amount.

There are two kinds of reputation you can specify here: 
 - {0}, which is the sum of all player's ratings, multiplied by a network effect.
 - {1}, which is the sum of the opinions from players you have rated favorably (and who they have rated favorably, etc).

You can review the reputations of all players on the server through the citizen list, which displays players in reputation order, and displays reviews from other players in the reputation tooltip.
trans-unit.source:
This clause allows you to restrict the acceptance of a contract to only those that have a reputation equal to or greater than the defined amount.

There are two kinds of reputation you can specify here: 
 - {0}, which is the sum of all player's ratings, multiplied by a network effect.
 - {1}, which is the sum of the opinions from players you have rated favorably (and who they have rated favorably, etc).

You can review the reputations of all players on the server through the citizen list, which displays players in reputation order, and displays reviews from other players in the reputation tooltip.
trans-unit.target:
Bu koşul ile ancak itibar seviyesi belirlenen değere eşit ya da belirlenen değerden yüksek olanlara kabul edilmeyi yasaklayabilirsin.

İki ayrı türde itibar vardır: 
 - {0}, ilki bir oyuncunun tüm derecelendirmelerinin, bağlantı etkisiyle çarpılmasının sonucudur.
 - {1}, ikincisi de, favori olarak işaretlediğin oyuncuların (ve onların da favori olarak işaretlediği diğer oyuncular vs.) diğer oyunculardan aldığı fikirlerin toplamıdır.

Sunucudaki tüm oyuncuların itibar seviyesini vatandaş listesinden kontrol edebilir ve itibar bilgi çubuğundan diğer oyuncuların incelemelerine göz atabilirsin, ki hepsi sıralı şekilde sıralanmıştır.

trans-unit.id:
Remove all tree stumps and debris from the property under the given marker.

The contractor will be temporarily rights to remove debris and stumps on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.source:
Remove all tree stumps and debris from the property under the given marker.

The contractor will be temporarily rights to remove debris and stumps on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.target:
Verilen işaretin altındaki mülkten bütün ağaç kütüklerini ve molozlari kaldırın.

Müteahhit belirlenmiş mülkten kütükleri ve molozları kaldırmak için geçici olarak izin verecektir.

Not: Daha fazla kontrol için mülkü farklı tapulara ayırabilirsiniz.

trans-unit.id: Remove all tree debris from property at {0}. Contractor will be given temporary permission to remove debris on property.
trans-unit.source: Remove all tree debris from property at {0}. Contractor will be given temporary permission to remove debris on property.
trans-unit.target: {0} konumundaki mülkteki tüm ağaç kalıntılarını kaldır. Müteahhit bu mülkteki kalıntıları kaldırmak için geçici yetki elde edecek.

trans-unit.id:
With this clause, the contractor must plow the given number of square meters of field into plantable soil.

The contractor will temporarily be given right to plow on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.source:
With this clause, the contractor must plow the given number of square meters of field into plantable soil.

The contractor will temporarily be given right to plow on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.target:
Bu koşul ile, müteahhit miktarı verilen metrekare araziyi ekilebilir toprağa çevirecek şekilde sürmelidir.

 Müteahhite geçici olarak belirlenen mülkte sürüm hakkı tanınacaktır.

Not: Daha fazla kontrol için mülkü farklı tapulara ayırabilirsiniz.

trans-unit.id:
All grass tiles on specified property must be cut with a sickle or other mower. 

The contractor will temporarily be given the right to mow on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.source:
All grass tiles on specified property must be cut with a sickle or other mower. 

The contractor will temporarily be given the right to mow on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.target:
Belirtilen mülkteki tüm otlar bir orak veya başka bir biçici alet ile kesilmelidir. 

Kontrat sahibine geçici süreyle belirtilen mülkte biçme hakkı verilecektir.

Dikkat: Daha fazla kontrol için mülkü farklı işlere ayırabilirsin.

trans-unit.id: Defines a container that must contain a set of objects. Both you and the contractor must have access rights on the selected container.\n\nYou can automatically give the contractor access rights to the container for the term of the contract with an additional {0} contract clause.
trans-unit.source: Defines a container that must contain a set of objects. Both you and the contractor must have access rights on the selected container.\n\nYou can automatically give the contractor access rights to the container for the term of the contract with an additional {0} contract clause.
trans-unit.target: Birtakım nesneler bulundurması gereken bir kutu tayin eder. Hem senin hem de müteahhitin seçilen kutuya erişim hakkı olması gerekir.\n\nKontrat süreci boyunca ek {0} kontrat maddesiyle müteahhite otomatik olarak kutuya erişim hakkı verebilirsin.

trans-unit.id:
All plants yielding the given types of resources must be harvested from this property, and placed into the specified container.

The contractor will temporarily be given rights to harvest on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.source:

Müteahhite geçici olarak belirtilen mülkte hasat yapma izni verilecektir.

trans-unit.id: One of a variety of values related to the environment.

trans-unit.id: The type of range we're using. If 'counting back from present', we use the past X hours. If using 'current time block', we use the most recent block of time of that size (IE, if time range is 24 we would use only the current day, resetting at midnight).
trans-unit.source: The type of range we're using. If 'counting back from present', we use the past X hours. If using 'current time block', we use the most recent block of time of that size (IE, if time range is 24 we would use only the current day, resetting at midnight).
trans-unit.target: Kullandığımız aralık türü. Eğer 'gecmişten geleceğe saymak' kullanılıyorsa, geçmiş X saat kullanırız. Eğer 'şimdiki zaman blogu' kullanılıyorsa o boyuttaki en son zaman bloğunu kullanırız (Yani, zaman aralığı 24 ise, sadece geçerli günü gece yarısında sıfırlayarak kullanabiliriz).

trans-unit.id: This clause will grant the contractor authorization to the selected object or property. Authorization can be granted temporarily for the length of the contract, or it can be given permanently. This permission can be given at either the beginning or end of the contract.\n\nIf you need a player to deliver something in a private container, or build on private land, you'll need to set their permissions with this clause to ensure they have access. Players accepting a contract should always ensure that they will receive the needed permissions to perform it.
trans-unit.source: This clause will grant the contractor authorization to the selected object or property. Authorization can be granted temporarily for the length of the contract, or it can be given permanently. This permission can be given at either the beginning or end of the contract.\n\nIf you need a player to deliver something in a private container, or build on private land, you'll need to set their permissions with this clause to ensure they have access. Players accepting a contract should always ensure that they will receive the needed permissions to perform it.
trans-unit.target: Bu anlaşma, çalışana seçilen obje yada mülkte yetki verecektir. Yetki, kontrat süresi botunca geçici olarak yada kalıcı olarak verilebilir. Bu yetki kontratın başında yada sonunda verilebilir.\n\n Eğer bir oyuncunun kişisel depolama alanında bir şey taşımasına yada kişisel toprakta inşa etmesine ihtiyacınız varsa, bu anlaşma ile yetki sahibi olduklarından daima emin olmalısınız. Kontratı kabul eden oyuncular her zaman gerekli yetkileri alacağından emin olmalıdır.

trans-unit.id: This clause provides a payment, with the option of collecting a deposit from the contractor.\n\nDeposits and payments are held in escrow for the duration of the contract. The amount in escrow is given to the contractor if the contract is successfully completed, or it goes to the client if the contract is marked as failed.
trans-unit.source: This clause provides a payment, with the option of collecting a deposit from the contractor.\n\nDeposits and payments are held in escrow for the duration of the contract. The amount in escrow is given to the contractor if the contract is successfully completed, or it goes to the client if the contract is marked as failed.

trans-unit.id: Air pollution output is divided by this to determine PPM. It depends on AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 and the world area. For 1km2 and pressure 1kg/m2, 1 ton = 1PPM (part per million), which is the unit that determines climate change effects.
trans-unit.source: Air pollution output is divided by this to determine PPM. It depends on AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 and the world area. For 1km2 and pressure 1kg/m2, 1 ton = 1PPM (part per million), which is the unit that determines climate change effects.
trans-unit.target: Hava kirliliği emisyonları bu formüle bölünerek milyonda bir parça PPM cinsinden ifade edilir ve bu da bölgeye ve metrekare başına atmosfer basıncına göre değişir. 1 km2'lik bir alan ve 1 kg/m2'lik bir atmosferik basınç için 1 ton, 1 PPM (milyonda bir parça) olarak ifade edilir ve birimlerin diğer etkenlerden dolayı değiştiğini görebilirsiniz.

trans-unit.id: How much PPM (particles per million) will be added to/removed from atmosphere per one tone of matter (i.e. CO2).
trans-unit.source: How much PPM (particles per million) will be added to/removed from atmosphere per one tone of matter (i.e. CO2).
trans-unit.target: Bir ton madde (örneğin CO2) başına atmosfere eklenecek/çıkarılacak PPM (her milyondaki partikül miktarı).

trans-unit.id: Atmosphere pressure used in the atmosphere size formula. Trees absorb and pollution from tables produced in tons and converted to PPM by dividing on total atmosphere size. AtmosphereSizeInTons = WorldAreaInM2 * AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 where WorldAreaInM2 = (Dimensions.x * 10) * (Dimensions.y * 10). In example for 1km² (1000000m²) world with atmosphere pressure 1 kg/m² it will be 1000000 tons, resulting in 1 PPM per 1 ton of pollution or absorb (1 PPM = 1000000 * tons / AtmosphereSizeInTons), increasing pressure to 2 will result in 0.5 PPM per ton.
trans-unit.source: Atmosphere pressure used in the atmosphere size formula. Trees absorb and pollution from tables produced in tons and converted to PPM by dividing on total atmosphere size. AtmosphereSizeInTons = WorldAreaInM2 * AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 where WorldAreaInM2 = (Dimensions.x * 10) * (Dimensions.y * 10). In example for 1km² (1000000m²) world with atmosphere pressure 1 kg/m² it will be 1000000 tons, resulting in 1 PPM per 1 ton of pollution or absorb (1 PPM = 1000000 * tons / AtmosphereSizeInTons), increasing pressure to 2 will result in 0.5 PPM per ton.
trans-unit.target: Atmosfer basıncı, atmosferin boyutunu (kütlesini) bulmak için formüllerde kullanılır. Veri tabanınızdaki ağaçlar tarafından emilen karbon miktarı veya üretilen kirlilik miktarı ton cinsinden ifade edilir ve bu miktar atmosferin toplam büyüklüğüne bölünerek PPM'ye dönüştürülebilir. Atmosferin ton cinsinden büyüklüğü = dünyanın metrekare cinsinden büyüklüğü * bu dünyada metrekare başına düşen kilogram hava basıncı = (boyut.x * 10) * (boyut.y * 10). Örneğin, 1 km²'lik (1.000.000 m²) bir dünya 1 kg/m²'lik bir hava basıncına sahip olacaktır, bu da 1.000.000 ton eder ve ton başına 1 PPM kirlilik veya emilimle sonuçlanır (1 PPM = 1.000.000 * ton/ton cinsinden atmosfer boyutu) ve hava basıncı 2'ye yükselirse, sonuç ton başına 0,5 PPM olacaktır.

trans-unit.id: A basic workspace for crafting fertilizer and extracting seeds from crops.
trans-unit.source: A basic workspace for crafting fertilizer and extracting seeds from crops.
trans-unit.target: Gübre üretmek ve mahsüllerden tohum çıkarmak için temel bir çalışma alanı.

trans-unit.id: Masons craft with stone and are a valuable source of building material and furniture. The ore they collect is used by smiths to smelt into metal bars.
trans-unit.source: Masons craft with stone and are a valuable source of building material and furniture. The ore they collect is used by smiths to smelt into metal bars.
trans-unit.target: Duvarcılar taşları işleyerek değerli malzemeler ve mobilyalar ortaya çıkarırlar. Topladıkları cevherler ise demirciler tarafından eritilerek metal barlara dönüştürmek için kullanılır.

trans-unit.id: Chefs create highly nutritious food using the raw food provided by hunters and farmers.
trans-unit.source: Chefs create highly nutritious food using the raw food provided by hunters and farmers.
trans-unit.target: Aşçılar, avcılardan ve çiftçilerden temin ettikleri çiğ yiyecekleri kullanarak besin değeri oldukça yüksek yiyecekler yaparlar.

trans-unit.id: Old growth redwood trees develop over centuries, with some living trees being over 2000 years old. Unlike most trees, these are a non-renewable resource and will not grow back if harvested.
trans-unit.source: Old growth redwood trees develop over centuries, with some living trees being over 2000 years old. Unlike most trees, these are a non-renewable resource and will not grow back if harvested.
trans-unit.target: Yaşlı kızılçam ağaçları büyümeleri yüzyıllar sürebilir ve yaşayan bazı ağaçların yaşı 2000'nin üzerindedir. Çoğu ağacın aksine, bunlar yenilenemeyen kaynaktır ve hasat ettikten sonra büyümüyorlar.

trans-unit.id: Cargo shorts that are ideal for exploring the great outdoors. More practical than elegant.
trans-unit.source: Cargo shorts that are ideal for exploring the great outdoors. More practical than elegant.
trans-unit.target: Doğayı keşfetmek için ideal kargo şortlar. Şıktan ziyade pratiklerdir.

trans-unit.id: A sturdy pair of rubber footwear designed to provide protection against water, rain, and mud.
trans-unit.source: A sturdy pair of rubber footwear designed to provide protection against water, rain, and mud.
trans-unit.target: Suya, yağmura ve çamura karşı koruma sağlayan sağlam bir çift lastik çizme.

trans-unit.id: A fashionable cloth belt that drapes across the waist.

trans-unit.id: Palm log comes from the palm tree, which is unique among trees that it is neither hardwood nor softwood. It still makes an excellent building material.
trans-unit.source: Palm log comes from the palm tree, which is unique among trees that it is neither hardwood nor softwood. It still makes an excellent building material.

trans-unit.id: Joshua log is a basic wood, harvested from the Joshua tree. Despite the name, Joshua trees are succulents and the building material they provide is neither hardwood nor softwood.
trans-unit.source: Joshua log is a basic wood, harvested from the Joshua tree. Despite the name, Joshua trees are succulents and the building material they provide is neither hardwood nor softwood.
trans-unit.target: Joshua kerestesi, Joshua ağacından elde edilen temel bir odundur. Adlarına rağmen, Joshua ağaçları etli bir bitki türüdür ve sağladıkları yapı malzemesi ne yumuşak ne de sert kerestedir.

trans-unit.id: Factors into experience per level for specialties.

trans-unit.id: How old records can be grouped. It means it will try to process all last X days of records to group them. Usually you want to have this number low (1-2) in order to avoid process already processed records, but you can set high value (by example world age) in order to process at once all records from some old save with disabled grouping.
trans-unit.source: How old records can be grouped. It means it will try to process all last X days of records to group them. Usually you want to have this number low (1-2) in order to avoid process already processed records, but you can set high value (by example world age) in order to process at once all records from some old save with disabled grouping.

trans-unit.id: Max count of records that will be proccesed at once hourly. For reference, server with 100 players may reach 1.000.000 records per day. Usually 500.000 (default) should be ok, but you may want to tweak it if you have incredibly big count of records or if you are facing lag while it groups records.
trans-unit.source: Max count of records that will be proccesed at once hourly. For reference, server with 100 players may reach 1.000.000 records per day. Usually 500.000 (default) should be ok, but you may want to tweak it if you have incredibly big count of records or if you are facing lag while it groups records.

trans-unit.id: A tax taken from citizens that are transferring currency from their account to another player's account.
trans-unit.source: A tax taken from citizens that are transferring currency from their account to another player's account.
trans-unit.target: Kendi hesaplarından başka oyuncuların hesabına döviz aktaran vatandaşlardan alınan vergi.

trans-unit.id: A tax taken from citizens that are transferring currency from their account to another account which they have access to. Generally tax rates on transfers between two accounts you both own is zero, but this tax rate can be set to prevent tax evasion by changing ownership of bank accounts after a transfer.
trans-unit.source: A tax taken from citizens that are transferring currency from their account to another account which they have access to. Generally tax rates on transfers between two accounts you both own is zero, but this tax rate can be set to prevent tax evasion by changing ownership of bank accounts after a transfer.
trans-unit.target: Hesaplarından erişimi olan başka bir hesaba döviz aktaran vatandaşlardan alınan vergi. Genelde iki sahip olduğun hesap arasında aktarım yapmanın vergi oranı sıfırdır, ama vergi kaçakçılığını önlemek için bir aktarımdan sonra banka hesaplarının sahipliğini değiştirerek vergi oranı ayarlanabilir.

trans-unit.id: A tax taken from citizens when using a currency exchange. Tax is charged as an extra cost to the customer, and the given percent is taken from both currencies in the transaction (thus you may want this to half of what you want the expected tax percent to be, since both are taxed).
trans-unit.source: A tax taken from citizens when using a currency exchange. Tax is charged as an extra cost to the customer, and the given percent is taken from both currencies in the transaction (thus you may want this to half of what you want the expected tax percent to be, since both are taxed).
trans-unit.target: Döviz değişimi kullanırken vatandaşlardan alınan vergi. Vergi müşteriye ekstra bir maliyet olarak tahsil edilir, ve verilen yüzde işlemdeki her iki para biriminden alınır (böylece, her ikisi de vergilendiğinden, bunun beklenen vergi yüzdesinin olmasını istediğinizin yarısı olmasını isteyebilirsiniz).

trans-unit.id: Injection detected. Please, stop using third-party software for code injections or you will be reported and permanently banned on all servers.
trans-unit.source: Injection detected. Please, stop using third-party software for code injections or you will be reported and permanently banned on all servers.
trans-unit.target: Enjeksiyon tespit edildi. Lütfen kod enjeksiyonları için üçüncü taraf yazılımları kullanmayı bırakın, aksi takdirde rapor edileceksiniz ve tüm sunucularda kalıcı olarak yasaklanacaksınız.

trans-unit.id: The assembly line allows for mass production of mechanical products.

trans-unit.source: A fancy ashlar stone table that has been adorned with gold.

trans-unit.id: All citizens are survivalists in the world of Eco. How can you save the world if you can't save yourself?
trans-unit.source: All citizens are survivalists in the world of Eco. How can you save the world if you can't save yourself?

trans-unit.id: Metal is an important part of progress and smelting is the first step into a new age. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Metal is an important part of progress and smelting is the first step into a new age. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Self-improvement increases both the amount of weight citizens can carry and their stomach capacity. It also decreases the calories expended when using hammers and shovels. Experience is gained when leveling up other specialties.
trans-unit.source: Self-improvement increases both the amount of weight citizens can carry and their stomach capacity. It also decreases the calories expended when using hammers and shovels. Experience is gained when leveling up other specialties.

trans-unit.id: Pottery is an advancement in masonry and can provide an excellent building material for communities. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Pottery is an advancement in masonry and can provide an excellent building material for communities. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Paper to carry the written word. Or used to stuff in bookshelves. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Paper to carry the written word. Or used to stuff in bookshelves. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: While it takes some advanced tools and constructions, harvesting and refining oil can be an important step. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: While it takes some advanced tools and constructions, harvesting and refining oil can be an important step. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Hitting rocks with a pickaxe can be surprisingly difficult. Levels up by breaking rocks.
trans-unit.source: Hitting rocks with a pickaxe can be surprisingly difficult. Levels up by breaking rocks.

trans-unit.id: Milling various products can create important materials for baking and other uses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Milling various products can create important materials for baking and other uses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Mechanics for more advanced creations. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Mechanics for more advanced creations. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Rocks and mortar can provide a suitable building material alternative to wood. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Rocks and mortar can provide a suitable building material alternative to wood. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Wood is a useful resource and cutting down trees is a skill anyone can appreciate. Levels up by felling trees and clearing debris.
trans-unit.source: Wood is a useful resource and cutting down trees is a skill anyone can appreciate. Levels up by felling trees and clearing debris.

trans-unit.id: Advanced industrialization to produce larger machines and advanced technology. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Advanced industrialization to produce larger machines and advanced technology. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Hunt animals for skin and meat. Levels up by successfully hunting.
trans-unit.source: Hunt animals for skin and meat. Levels up by successfully hunting.

trans-unit.id: Glassworkers have improved ability to create glass which can be used as a clear building material or framed in steel to create a more industrial look. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Glassworkers have improved ability to create glass which can be used as a clear building material or framed in steel to create a more industrial look. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Gathering covers harvesting materials from both the natural environment and human-created farms. Levels up by gathering plants - farmed or natural.
trans-unit.source: Gathering covers harvesting materials from both the natural environment and human-created farms. Levels up by gathering plants - farmed or natural.

trans-unit.id: Adding additional nutrients to the soil can improve farming yield or, if overdone, ruin it. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Adding additional nutrients to the soil can improve farming yield or, if overdone, ruin it. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: The art of planting and cultivating flora. Levels up by crafting related recipes and using the hoe.
trans-unit.source: The art of planting and cultivating flora. Levels up by crafting related recipes and using the hoe.

trans-unit.id: Electronics improves the recipes for many advanced materials needed for advanced technology. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Electronics improves the recipes for many advanced materials needed for advanced technology. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Cutting edge cooking works with ingredients that don't quite sound like food but can potentially provide high calorie and nutrition. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Cutting edge cooking works with ingredients that don't quite sound like food but can potentially provide high calorie and nutrition. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Allows the construction of advanced wood products for furniture and houses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Allows the construction of advanced wood products for furniture and houses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: Cutting logs into usable crafting and building materials is an important skill for budding communities. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Cutting logs into usable crafting and building materials is an important skill for budding communities. Levels up by crafting related recipes.

trans-unit.id: This clause will grant the contractor authorization to the selected object or property. Authorization can be granted temporarily for the length of the contract, or it can be given permanently. This permission can be given at either the beginning or end of the contract.\n\nIf you need a player to deliver something in a private container, or build on private land, you'll need to set their permissions with this clause to ensure they have access. Players accepting a contract should always ensure that they will receive the needed permissions to perform it.
trans-unit.source: This clause will grant the contractor authorization to the selected object or property. Authorization can be granted temporarily for the length of the contract, or it can be given permanently. This permission can be given at either the beginning or end of the contract.\n\nIf you need a player to deliver something in a private container, or build on private land, you'll need to set their permissions with this clause to ensure they have access. Players accepting a contract should always ensure that they will receive the needed permissions to perform it.

trans-unit.id: This clause allows players to define in words what they would like done. When using this clause, the contract can no longer be auto-approved, and the client will have to approve it before accepting it. When accepting a contract with a custom clause, it is wise to first review the reputation of the citizen offering it, because it is fully at their discretion to approve or deny its completion.\n\nYou must uncheck {0} at the bottom of the contract to use this clause.
trans-unit.source: This clause allows players to define in words what they would like done. When using this clause, the contract can no longer be auto-approved, and the client will have to approve it before accepting it. When accepting a contract with a custom clause, it is wise to first review the reputation of the citizen offering it, because it is fully at their discretion to approve or deny its completion.\n\nYou must uncheck {0} at the bottom of the contract to use this clause.

trans-unit.id: Defines a road that must be built between points A and B, defined by placing a {0} at each position. The width of the road must be the defined minimum throughout, and it must be made entirely of the listed material.

trans-unit.id:
Defines a set of blocks that must exist, or not exist on a property. This can be used for all kinds of things:
 - Removing unwanted plants
 - Removing pollution
 - Planting fields (planted blocks must exist)
 - Removing structures or obstacles.

If {0} is checked, only surface blocks will be examined. Otherwise, blocks to a depth of {1} below the highest block will be examined.
trans-unit.source:

trans-unit.id: Your GPU's Max Tessellation Level is less than 64. AMD is the only known GPU manufacturer who doesn't follow the standard and reduces this setting to hack performance in their "AMD Radeon Software", setting it to 8 in the default optimized settings. You may experience problems with the Minimap rendering. To fix this, set "Max Tessellation Level" to 64 in the software for Eco (explicitly) and restart the game.

trans-unit.id: This setting defines how plants will be grouped when the world generates. It have two levels of grouping: clusters and groups. A cluster is a large area of the world where a particular type of plant exists, and it affects gameplay by limiting where specific plants can be spawned. Groups are primarily for visual purposes, so plants of the same species grow together with only a small distance between them.
trans-unit.source: This setting defines how plants will be grouped when the world generates. It have two levels of grouping: clusters and groups. A cluster is a large area of the world where a particular type of plant exists, and it affects gameplay by limiting where specific plants can be spawned. Groups are primarily for visual purposes, so plants of the same species grow together with only a small distance between them.

trans-unit.source: A small and agile canid with a reddish-orange fur coat and a bushy tail. Foxes are known for their intelligence and problem-solving skills, and have been observed using tools and displaying advanced problem-solving abilities in the wild.

trans-unit.id: A majestic deer species found in forests and grasslands, characterized by its large antlers and brownish-gray coat. Male elk, also called bulls, grow and shed their antlers annually, which can reach up to 1.2 meters (4 feet) in length.
trans-unit.source: A majestic deer species found in forests and grasslands, characterized by its large antlers and brownish-gray coat. Male elk, also called bulls, grow and shed their antlers annually, which can reach up to 1.2 meters (4 feet) in length.

trans-unit.id: A graceful, herbivorous mammal with a reddish-brown coat that inhabits forests and fields. Deer have evolved a variety of adaptations to avoid predators, such as their excellent sense of hearing, smell, and vision, as well as their ability to run fast and jump high.
trans-unit.source: A graceful, herbivorous mammal with a reddish-brown coat that inhabits forests and fields. Deer have evolved a variety of adaptations to avoid predators, such as their excellent sense of hearing, smell, and vision, as well as their ability to run fast and jump high.

trans-unit.id: A crustacean with a hard exoskeleton and two large pincers used for defense, feeding, and courtship displays. Crabs are omnivores and feed on a variety of foods, including algae, other invertebrates, and carrion.
trans-unit.source: A crustacean with a hard exoskeleton and two large pincers used for defense, feeding, and courtship displays. Crabs are omnivores and feed on a variety of foods, including algae, other invertebrates, and carrion.

trans-unit.id: A clever and adaptable canid with a bushy tail and distinctive howling and yipping vocalizations. Known for their scavenging and hunting abilities, coyotes can be found in many different habitats.
trans-unit.source: A clever and adaptable canid with a bushy tail and distinctive howling and yipping vocalizations. Known for their scavenging and hunting abilities, coyotes can be found in many different habitats.

trans-unit.id: A massive, shaggy mammal with a large head, humped shoulders, and distinctive curved horns. Often seen grazing on grasslands and prairies, bison are an important example of a species that has made a remarkable comeback from the brink of extinction due to conservation efforts.
trans-unit.source: A massive, shaggy mammal with a large head, humped shoulders, and distinctive curved horns. Often seen grazing on grasslands and prairies, bison are an important example of a species that has made a remarkable comeback from the brink of extinction due to conservation efforts.

trans-unit.id: These wild ungulates are known for their distinctive curved horns, which are used for dominance battles and display during the mating season. They are well adapted to harsh environments and are found in both mountainous and desert regions.
trans-unit.source: These wild ungulates are known for their distinctive curved horns, which are used for dominance battles and display during the mating season. They are well adapted to harsh environments and are found in both mountainous and desert regions.

trans-unit.id: A large, scaly reptile with a powerful bite and a long tail, commonly found near rivers, swamps, and lakes in warm regions. Alligators are ancient creatures that have remained virtually unchanged for millions of years.
trans-unit.source: A large, scaly reptile with a powerful bite and a long tail, commonly found near rivers, swamps, and lakes in warm regions. Alligators are ancient creatures that have remained virtually unchanged for millions of years.

trans-unit.id: A small brownish rodent with sharp incisors that help them crack open hard seeds and fruits, allowing them to play an important role in seed dispersal.

trans-unit.id:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.
trans-unit.source:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.

trans-unit.id: Annexing a target requires paying them Claim Papers from the source settlement. Unlike resources, these 100% go to the foundation of the target without waste. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.\n\nIn the case of annexing a Homestead, this number will be increased by the number of Homestead Support Claim Papers that are on the stake. This makes the support claims not only allow homesteads to claim more plots, but have more protection against annexation.
trans-unit.source: Annexing a target requires paying them Claim Papers from the source settlement. Unlike resources, these 100% go to the foundation of the target without waste. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.\n\nIn the case of annexing a Homestead, this number will be increased by the number of Homestead Support Claim Papers that are on the stake. This makes the support claims not only allow homesteads to claim more plots, but have more protection against annexation.

trans-unit.id:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.
trans-unit.source:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.

trans-unit.id: Determines how fast the game progresses, with 30 days being the normal progression. When set faster, the meteor will hit sooner but you will gain skill faster and crafting will take less time.
trans-unit.source: Determines how fast the game progresses, with 30 days being the normal progression. When set faster, the meteor will hit sooner but you will gain skill faster and crafting will take less time.

trans-unit.id: When set, citizens will become exhausted after the given number of hours. While exhausted, they cannot spend calories, but can still do other activities like making culture, etc. This setting is used to prevent some players from getting ahead of everyone else by playing many more hours than everyone else.
trans-unit.source: When set, citizens will become exhausted after the given number of hours. While exhausted, they cannot spend calories, but can still do other activities like making culture, etc. This setting is used to prevent some players from getting ahead of everyone else by playing many more hours than everyone else.

trans-unit.id: Expected number of players that will be contributing towards the meteor. Adjusting this will change the number of specialties each person can take (depending on collaboration level).
trans-unit.source: Expected number of players that will be contributing towards the meteor. Adjusting this will change the number of specialties each person can take (depending on collaboration level).

trans-unit.id: How much collaboration citizens are expected to take part in. High collaboration means everyone will be highly reliant on the society functioning properly. No collaboration means no dependence is required, but you can still trade.
trans-unit.source: How much collaboration citizens are expected to take part in. High collaboration means everyone will be highly reliant on the society functioning properly. No collaboration means no dependence is required, but you can still trade.

trans-unit.id: How strictly do you want to simulate logisitics like transport, inventory carry size, etc. Higher settings will make transport more important (you will need vehicles to move large quantities) and lower settings will allow individuals to carry large amounts, removing need for vehicles.
trans-unit.source: How strictly do you want to simulate logisitics like transport, inventory carry size, etc. Higher settings will make transport more important (you will need vehicles to move large quantities) and lower settings will allow individuals to carry large amounts, removing need for vehicles.

trans-unit.id: Trade is very important in Eco.\n
trans-unit.source: Trade is very important in Eco.\n

trans-unit.id: There are two kinds of Currency in Eco: \n\nCitizen Credit (which that citizen can create infinite amounts of) and Backed Currency, which can only be created at a Mint and consumes resources.
trans-unit.source: There are two kinds of Currency in Eco: \n\nCitizen Credit (which that citizen can create infinite amounts of) and Backed Currency, which can only be created at a Mint and consumes resources.

trans-unit.id: Citizens specialize in different skills and need to trade with other specialists to acquire what they need.
trans-unit.source: Citizens specialize in different skills and need to trade with other specialists to acquire what they need.

trans-unit.id: Use it to buy and sell both goods and services to other citizens.

trans-unit.id: An economy can thrive much better if citizens use a common currency, so this is a good goal to work towards as a group.
trans-unit.source: An economy can thrive much better if citizens use a common currency, so this is a good goal to work towards as a group.
